  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:29PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>TMC leaders join BJP:</strong> Former Rajya Sabha MPs Sushmita Dev, Sukhendu Sekhar Roy, and Prakash Chik Baraik have joined the BJP and were immediately named as the party&#x27;s candidates for the upcoming Rajya Sabha by-elections.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I86</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliament march planned:</strong> Activists, including Sonam Wangchuk, have called for a peaceful march to Parliament on July 20, potentially creating a significant challenge for the NDA government at the start of the Monsoon session.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPTFZjQ2NJdjZxTDdZTW9nQkFDREk5ZGhsV0NuTTBBM2F6SjBJVW1QVkhTaFcxdFFlLTNwdVZsNGVnLTVxQlZoaFFjWUpkNkI4bE82VkR4U1hmcTU2VEdLTGE0YWh2aHFlaFZyQXpicU9RQUpjQ0Z3SDlUWkczU3ltYVQ5UkdyVW1hbVNUd0ItYjJ1dFlOLXZUNURWYS1mLWpmX3BnT0N6V21xLVU?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative setback:</strong> The Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at providing women&#x27;s reservation in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass in the Lok Sabha.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Opposition legal strategy:</strong> The INDIA bloc is planning to escalate its concerns regarding the Election Commission of India and other institutional matters by submitting a formal letter to all Supreme Court judges.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxOQXNGNHR0akRCa0piOENNaUpEakFsMU94NVFESVJjczBlR2tBT3haVlZCTnlKQzZVdHRnQWdCdGdpVFNOMnE0Xzd2VUozdDhkbWl0RlFqUTZ6MGJCY2NXdV9lZGl2VkFvdVBLUS1sM3hVQkNSeUU0Z2hzR3FzenZGVFpFdlh5RU9nOWpFZkZLcTcwaGxoeERMNkY3RQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxNZFlFUTgyMHJIX1RYb0hoaVpmQWxfalBRVURZMGk0azdQN2pkbm03RnJvaVBUQjlPelRwQURmeERpVjlKVVhXQlB6QWlZWFY0TGtkaTdNTy1pRHBveldqS2h4c3htR2NaMWRqamVpTVczQzY2VG1xNlZuaGs2ODdIZmJ2ZVpjNklsS29mV0RVZ0NsT1NXcmhDdHBIQWp5aXFkMHd2S3lR?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a></span></li>
</ul>
